trap_question: Sole trader buys car used 70% for business: how much AIA?
correct_answer: £0 - AIA is never available on cars (use WDA by CO2 band; single-asset pool with 70% restriction on allowance).
why_students_miss: Students confuse plant-and-machinery rules with car rules.

trap_question: Client entertaining at a dinner that includes staff - any input recovery?
correct_answer: Recover only the proportion attributable to staff; client portion blocked (if staff are mere incidental hosts to client entertaining the whole supply is blocked).

trap_question: Director paid monthly - use monthly earnings period?
correct_answer: No - directors use an annual earnings period regardless of pay frequency.

trap_question: Dividend received from 80% subsidiary - included in augmented profits?
why_students_miss: Students include it and mis-size augmented profits.

correct_answer: No - FYA 100% requires a NEW zero-emission car. Second-hand goes to main pool (normally).
why_students_miss: Students grant FYA on any EV.

trap_question: Residential property sold; residual BR band £15k of £37,700 available; gain £50k after AEA. Rate split?
why_students_miss: Students use 10%/20% or apply all at 24%.

trap_question: Two-month roll-forward forecast > £90k - when to register?
correct_answer: Register immediately (future 30-day test); effective from the start of that 30-day window.
why_students_miss: Students wait for the historic test to trigger.

trap_question: Sole trader's own salary £30k charged in accounts: adjust?
correct_answer: Add back (disallowable - drawings are not an expense).

trap_question: Used BADR; b/f capital losses £10k; should you set against BADR gains?
correct_answer: No - allocate losses and AEA against highest-rate gains first (saves 20/24% rather than 10%).
